description: MainActivity class for an Android app demonstrating biometric authentication and session state management, including lifecycle handling and user prompts.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Android activity managing biometric login, session state, and UI updates.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes UI, auth manager, biometric authenticator, and sets up observers for auth state changes.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles re-locking logic on app foreground return based on configuration.

methods.name: onPause
methods.description: Lifecycle hook; currently not used for locking but could be implemented.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels the auth state observer job.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Updates the status text view with provided string.

methods.name: promptUnlockIfPossible
methods.description: Checks locking state and availability of biometric auth; initiates prompt if possible.
